name: canshare-who-haematology-b-cell-lymphoid-histology
title: New Zealand WHO haematolymphoid B cell lymphoid neoplasm histology
description: Histologies used for B-cell lymphoid neoplasm (WHO Classification of Tumours, Haematolymphoid Tumours) which are not Castleman disease, Acute lymphoblastic leukaemia, Indolent non-Hodgkin B cell lymphoma, Aggressive non-Hodgkin B cell lymphoma, Hodgkin lymphoma or Plasma cell disorders or an 'Other' value.
